error_signature: Webhook URL generated as HTTP instead of HTTPS
title: WhatsApp Trigger Webhook URL not using HTTPS
symptom: The Webhook URL generated by the WhatsApp Trigger node is HTTP, preventing registration with Meta/Facebook.
applies_when: Running n8n behind an Nginx reverse proxy
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly generated as HTTPS
root_cause: n8n needs to be configured to recognize that it is behind a reverse proxy. Without the correct settings, it defaults to HTTP for webhook URLs, which is incompatible with services requiring HTTPS.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable N8N_PROXY_HOPS=1 in your n8n configuration.
Ensure N8N_PORT is set to 5678, the internal port n8n listens on, not 443.
Restart the n8n container to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the N8N_PROXY_HOPS and N8N_PORT environment variables, then restart the n8n container.
